---
title: "Zoey"
image: /images/touxiang.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/hyfzi"
    - text: Email
      url: "zhyi_feng@126.com"
    - text: CV
      url: "cv.pdf"
comments: false
---

::: column-page
## Bio

A SAS Programmer

## Education

Macalester College \| St. Paul, MN B.A in Economics \| Sept 2007 - June 2011

## Experience

Wengo Analytics \| Head Data Scientist \| April 2018 - present
:::
